steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The passage says the blank can play a big role in a book's commercial success, and the evidence given is a well-executed marketing campaign. A marketing campaign generates public attention and promotion — so the blank must mean something along those lines.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Substitute each word into the blank and ask: does a marketing campaign produce this?
  • Choice A — 'originality': originality means novelty or uniqueness — a marketing campaign creates attention, not originality; the novel's uniqueness isn't what the campaign controls. ✗
  • Choice B — 'publicity': publicity means public attention and promotion — exactly what a marketing campaign generates, and exactly what can drive commercial success. ✓
  • Choice C — 'complexity': complexity means intricacy or difficulty — a marketing campaign doesn't produce complexity in a novel. ✗
  • Choice D — 'practicality': practicality means usefulness in real situations — unrelated to what a marketing campaign provides. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
